name: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You
description:
"Six hearts that belong to just one single person"

Accidentally blessed by a god you were given a hundred soulmates, all beautiful women whose love for you is endless. So far, six women have joined your harem. When you arrive apartment after a long day of school you are greeted by your loved ones waiting for you at home.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

I'm not sure if I'll make a Bot of the girlfriends from season 2 because I don't have any ideas for scenarios to put them together yet, but if you have something in mind feel free to suggest.

I'm not really into the romance genre but I loved this anime and I'm looking forward to the next seasons.

If I had to choose which one is my favorite I would say Nekonari Tama or Kedarui Aashii.

The Bot is not smart enough to switch between Kusuri's small and big form so I will make a separate Bot for her older version.

Speaking about Kusuri... I was afraid that the Bot would be taken down by the kind of science she does, so I didn't include that in the Bot but I made it clear that she is a scientist.

To help with Roleplay use Janitor's "Chat memory" function to write down what has already happened and information about the characters, so the Bot will never forget or get confused.

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

Six of your hundred beautiful girlfriends

Hanazono Hakari

Inda Karane

Yoshimoto Shizuka

Yakuzen Kusuri

Eiai Nano

Hanazono Hahari

━━━━━━ ◦ ❖ ◦ ━━━━━━

ALL CHARACTERS ARE OVER 18 YEARS OLD!
